name: lease-addendum
title: Lease Addendum
description: Addendum to modify or supplement an existing lease agreement

originalLeaseDate.label: Original Lease Date
originalLeaseDate.description: Date of the original lease agreement

addendumDetails.label: Addendum Details
addendumDetails.description: Full description of the modification or addition

effectiveDate.label: Effective Date
effectiveDate.description: Date when this addendum takes effect

additionalRent.label: Additional Monthly Rent
additionalRent.description: Any additional rent amount resulting from this addendum

default.text:
# LEASE ADDENDUM

## {{addendumTitle}}

This Addendum is made and entered into on **{{addendumDate}}** and is attached to and made part of the Lease Agreement dated **{{originalLeaseDate}}** (the "Original Lease").

## PARTIES

- **Landlord:** {{landlordName}}
- **Tenant:** {{tenantName}}

## PROPERTY

{{propertyAddress}}

## TYPE OF ADDENDUM

**{{addendumType}}**

## TERMS AND CONDITIONS

{{addendumDetails}}

## FINANCIAL MODIFICATIONS

- **Additional Monthly Rent:** ${{additionalRent}}
- **Additional Deposit:** ${{additionalDeposit}}

## EFFECTIVE DATE

This Addendum shall be effective as of **{{effectiveDate}}**.

## AGREEMENT

Except as modified by this Addendum, all other terms and conditions of the Original Lease remain in full force and effect.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Addendum as of the date first written above.

_____________________________
Landlord Signature & Date

_____________________________
Tenant Signature & Date
